subject: english
title: Unit 8 Book Reading — Hurum's Hobby
subtitle: Biography of Jørn Hurum · Ask Questions strategy · 18 slides · 21 vocabulary words

content: Read a biography about Jørn Hurum and how he turned fossil collecting into a career.
Use the Ask Questions reading strategy with a Q&A chart.
Sequence key events and retell the story.
language: Use vocabulary words enjoy, collect, bug, fossil, alone, and dinosaur.
Use glossary words like paleontologist, primate, preserved, and escorted.
Use relative clauses with who to describe people.
